abilities.description: Flip a coin. If it comes up heads, counter target instant or sorcery spell. If it comes up tails, copy that spell and you may choose new targets for the copy.

effect.description: Flip a coin. If it comes up heads, counter target instant or sorcery spell. If it comes up tails, copy that spell and you may choose new targets for the copy.
effect.name: FlipACoin

abilities.target_prompt: Select target instant or sorcery spell

abilities.description: Target player sacrifices two attacking creatures.
